title: Automate Root Cause Analysis (RCA) of Machine Failures

sipoc.Input: Incident reports, machine data, and historical failure logs.
sipoc.Process: Automate the RCA process by integrating new sensors or enhancing existing systems with artificial intelligence for real-time analysis of failures.
sipoc.Output: The system will automatically detect potential root causes based on pattern recognition from past incidents. Alerts can be generated to immediate maintenance teams.

title: Review and Update Operator Training Program

sipoc.Supplier: Operators or Users of the Machine
sipoc.Input: Previous task results, operator feedback on training sessions.
sipoc.Process: Review and update the operator's training program to ensure they understand proper inspection techniques for bearings, including signs of wear such as vibration, scoring, and leaks.
sipoc.Output: Operator training will be updated, focusing on identifying potential root causes and preventive maintenance tasks. Log entries will show improvements in operator skills.
